page.title: Series
page.subtitle: Group recurring meetings, share a glossary, speaker names and email tone.

empty.title: No series yet
empty.hint: Group related meetings into a series to share speakers and key terms.
empty.selectPromptHint: Click a series name to see its glossary, speaker names and tone settings.
empty.noSpeakers: No speaker names yet. They are added automatically when you rename speakers in meetings of this series.

form.deleteDescription: Member meetings will be detached from the series but not removed. The glossary and speaker names will be lost.

speakers.title: Speaker names
speakers.empty: No speakers known for this series yet.
